immutable_record_notice: This evidence record is immutable. Corrections or new decisions must create a new record version that references the superseded record.

claim.statement: The candidate admission policy satisfies the preregistered joint selective-retention criterion relative to the store-all baseline.
claim.scope: Only the exact mechanism version, frozen protocol, sources, seeds, and execution environments referenced by this evidence family.

security_and_privacy_review.threat_model_scope: Admission inputs, policy state, decision logs, user-scope binding, retrieval eligibility, and deletion handles in the synthetic harness.
trust_boundaries: Untrusted event source to admission runtime
Admission runtime to persistent storage adapter
adversary_capabilities: Submit crafted content, conflicting provenance, repetition, and in-band persistence instructions.
Observe decisions and timing for adversary-submitted synthetic events.

allowed: Admission outcome for events submitted in the adversary's own synthetic scope
denied: Policy mutation and access to another user's scope
assumptions: No external tool execution is available to candidate event content.

in_scope: Timing, reason codes, and diagnostic-log content
leakage_assumptions: The harness prevents direct process-memory and cross-user log access.

security_and_privacy_review.adversary_success_criterion: Cause unauthorized admission, persistent instruction activation, cross-user influence or inference, provenance forgery acceptance, or failed deletion.
authority_and_trust_assumptions: Only out-of-band user-scoped policy state conveys admission authority.
The runtime and storage adapter may be faulty and must produce auditable outcomes.
residual_risks: No control effectiveness has been evaluated in this draft.

independent_validation.summary: No independent validation has been requested or performed.

limitations.description: This example intentionally contains no run or empirical result.
limitations.risk_if_ignored: Readers could mistake a contract demonstration for evidence about the mechanism.
limitations.next_check: Create a separate evidence record only after a frozen protocol has been executed and audited.

limitations.description: The referenced protocol is limited to planned synthetic scenarios.
limitations.risk_if_ignored: Any future result could be overgeneralized to natural user interactions.
limitations.next_check: Evaluate external validity under a separately approved protocol after synthetic replication.

recommended_next_experiment: Freeze the manifest through an external registration envelope, implement the planned fixtures and configurations, and run only after independent protocol review.
